title: Golden Globes 2026 Snubs & Surprises: Hamnet, Sinners & More
text: Deadline analyzed the 2026 Golden Globes results, highlighting notable snubs and surprises from the ceremony. While some observers expected more competition in the Best Director category, Paul Thomas Anderson's victory was widely anticipated based on pre-ceremony predictions and odds. Deadline's analysis examined which nominees and films failed to win despite strong pre-ceremony positioning, as well as which victories were unexpected. The publication's coverage helps audiences understand how the actual results compared to industry expectations going into the ceremony.
